---
name: Dimension proposal
about: Propose a new axis of task variation to add to DIMENSIONS.md
title: "Dimension: <name>"
labels: dimension-proposal
---

**Proposed dimension name**

<!-- One to four words. -->

**Definition**

<!-- One sentence. What property of a task does this dimension describe, and along what axis does it vary? -->

**Poles or scale**

<!-- What are the extremes? (e.g., "fully observable ↔ fully hidden", "single-step ↔ unbounded horizon") -->

**Concrete signature**

<!-- Required. Where would this dimension appear in a real benchmark spec, harness config, environment interface, or agent trace? Name a specific benchmark or evaluation setup where you can point to the setting. -->

**Worked examples across at least three task types**

<!-- How does this dimension vary across different benchmark families? What changes in agent behavior or evaluation results when it shifts? -->

**What this makes visible**

<!-- What does naming this dimension reveal that leaderboard rankings or pass-rates hide? -->

**Extractive constraint check**

<!-- Is this dimension independent of existing dimensions in DIMENSIONS.md? Which existing dimensions did you check? -->
